    Class
    Description
    BaseBean
    /** BaseBean is an abstract parent bean class that contains common attributes shared by all application beans.
    DropdownListBean
    DropdownListBean interface is used to provide key and value methods for displaying data in dropdown lists.

    Description

  • Classes in in.co.rays.proj4.bean used by in.co.rays.proj4.model
    Class
    Description
    CollegeBean
    CollegeBean represents a College entity containing college-related information such as name, address, state, city, and phone number.
    CourseBean
    CourseBean class contains Course information.
    FacultyBean
    FacultyBean class contains faculty information.
    MarksheetBean
    MarksheetBean class contains student marksheet information.
    RoleBean
    RoleBean class contains role information.
    StudentBean
    StudentBean class contains student information.
    SubjectBean
    SubjectBean class contains subject information.
    TimetableBean
    TimetableBean class is used as a Bean/DTO to store timetable and examination details such as semester, description, exam date, exam time, course details, and subject details.
    UserBean
    UserBean class is used as a Bean/DTO to store user-related information such as personal details, login credentials, role information, and contact details.
